description:
Add the manual server action "BICC v5: Send SMS Queue Digest" plus a menu
entry under Recruitment → Reporting that triggers it. When fired, it emails
the HR Recruitment Manager group ONE digest of every applicant who needs an
SMS follow-up right now, grouped by job position. Each job is rendered as
its own 3-column table (Applicant name with link, mobile number, ready-to
send SMS text with first name + company short name + job role pre-filled).

Also creates the five hr.applicant custom datetime fields the digest's
queue filters read. These fields originate from the recruitment v5
reminder tracking system (already present on production via Studio but
missing on the dev database). Creating them here makes the action work
end-to-end on every environment without a separate Studio step.

Queues feeding the digest:
- Qualification info-survey pending (Stage 2): reads x_studio_reminder_date
  AND x_studio_sms_reminder_date.
- Stage 1 resume missing: reads x_studio_resume_request_date AND
  x_studio_sms_new_reminder_date.
- Stage 7 assessment pending: reads x_studio_assessment_final_reminder_date.

Entry points: HR can fire the digest from Recruitment → Reporting → SMS
Follow-up Queue, or from any applicant's gear-icon Action menu.

Diagnostics: the action always creates a visible mail.mail (auto_delete=
False) with a Debug block in the body listing field-existence flags,
per-queue counts, and recipient resolution — so "nothing happened"
outcomes are diagnosable from the UI.
